name: Community Data License Agreement - Sharing, Version 1.0

references.note: Canonical publication source maintained by the Linux Foundation's Community Data License Agreement project.

approvals.note: Not OSI-approved. CDLA-Sharing-1.0 is a Linux Foundation data license rather than an open-source software license; it is not listed on OSI's approved-licenses list.
FSF does not classify data licenses on its free-software-licenses list. CDLA-Sharing-1.0 is not listed under either free or non-free categories.
